name: @chbrain/khai-engine-stress
description: khai engine content, the stress domain: stress response as process, how a persona routes a demand that exceeds its resources.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Stress response as process: how a persona routes a demand that exceeds its resources, fracturing into fight, flight, freeze, or fawn.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_stress.md) declares stress as a threshold breach when demands exceed resources, routing the surge system-wide.
card.issue: Four responses a persona may run: fight, flight, freeze, and fawn. Each is a process file composed under the root, so the action follows the demand. The responses are mutually exclusive at any single moment.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the specific stress response it runs in the scene.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real stress response process. Whether the response is true to the moment is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its read under Projection, linking the specific response. Read it in the first beat; the room enacts it, never narrates it.
